action: Offered the user a set of emotional well-being questions and gave the option to type their own question.
fallback_action: Prompt the user to manually type an emotional well-being question they'd like guidance on.

recipe.steps: Present a curated list of emotional well-being questions to the user. Offer the user the option to select from the list or type their own question.

can_perform_without_user_input: no - I need the user's input to choose or provide a question
